title: Borderless Glass
description: This resource pack makes glass borderless, and a little bit more transparent!
body:
Welcome to the Borderless Glass resourcepack page! 

Please be indulgent, as this is part of my firsts resource packs.
## ❔ What does this do?
This resource pack changes the textures taken from the glass panes and glass blocks to a new, better, and cooler one, a borderless one; A step up to decoration!
## ✅ Features
- Replaces the glass blocks' textures and glass panes'!
- Allows for a cooler gameplay!
- Helps with a small touch to building!
## 📸 Screenshots
